title: The Beast and Nausicaas God Warrior
display_title: The Beast and Nausicaas God Warrior
wikitext:
[]: The Beast and Nausicaa's God Warrior             Quote Post by jojojoker » Sat Jul 31, 2010 4:13 am I saw 2.22 and I immediately thought Eva-02 Beast mode resembled the god warrior. I think it's the teeth and green eyes. Well Anno DID work on the animation for Nausicaa so maybe it's a homage? Oh and sorry for the terrible pic quality

[]: Re: The Beast and Nausicaa's God Warrior             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Jul 31, 2010 4:21 am jojojoker wrote: Well Anno DID work on the animation for Nausicaa so maybe it's a homage?

[]:             Quote Post by Oz » Sat Jul 31, 2010 4:25 am It's very likely that it is a homage since Anno animated the God Warrior scene in Nausicaä on his own.

[]: Re: The Beast and Nausicaa's God Warrior             Quote Post by jojojoker » Sat Jul 31, 2010 4:28 am SaltyJoe wrote: Nice catch, and it's quite possible, considering the fact that on a conceptual level, the Evas are God Warriors cosplaying as mecha. I feel like i should post some comparison pics between God Mode Unit-01 and the God Warrior spreading it's "wings" in the Nauiscaa manga, but i'm too lazy.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Jul 31, 2010 5:05 am No pic, but here's a link: the God Warrior spreads it's wings for the first time (Nauiscaa manga, Vo. 5/Ch. 1). Compare that image to Eva-01 awakening at the end of 2.22. There's even a thread somewhere on this site for Nauiscaa specific [s]ripoffs[/s] homages in NGE. Basically, Anno took every idea that he didn't take from sci-fi shows or Ultraman from Nauiscaa.

[]:             Quote Post by jojojoker » Sat Jul 31, 2010 5:27 am Even with the third eye and crazy looking mouth. Hahaha Anno sure loves his homages. ;P

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Sat Jul 31, 2010 8:41 pm SaltyJoe wrote: There's even a thread somewhere on this site for Nauiscaa specific [s]ripoffs[/s] homages in NGE. Basically, Anno took every idea that he didn't take from sci-fi shows or Ultraman from Nauiscaa.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat Jul 31, 2010 10:00 pm SaltyJoe wrote: No pic, but here's a link: the God Warrior spreads it's wings for the first time (Nauiscaa manga, Vo. 5/Ch. 1). Compare that image to Eva-01 awakening at the end of 2.22.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Jul 31, 2010 10:49 pm SaltyJoe wrote: There's even a thread somewhere on this site for Nauiscaa specific [s]ripoffs[/s] homages in NGE. Basically, Anno took every idea that he didn't take from sci-fi shows or Ultraman from Nauiscaa.

[]:             Quote Post by jojojoker » Sat Jul 31, 2010 11:11 pm NemZ wrote: As long as were talking about Anno stealing from himself, don't forget Nadia.
